current_run.description: Given an oracle U_f that computes f(x) = popcount((x AND (x >> 1)) XOR secret_mask) % 2, the goal is to determine the secret_mask, an N-bit integer. The function (x AND (x >> 1)) detects patterns of adjacent '11' bits in x, then this intermediate result is XORed with a secret mask. Finally, the parity of the set bits (popcount) of the result is computed. This problem involves identifying a quadratic boolean function with an added secret mask.
